# Growth Escalators

> AI-first performance marketing agency based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. Core specialty is
> paid ads / performance marketing and media buying, with a primary focus on D2C brands. Also
> provides software development and AI automation services. 10,000+ campaigns run, ₹10Cr+ in ad
> spend managed, 97% client retention.

## Services

- [Performance Marketing & Media Buying](https://www.growthescalators.com/services): Meta Ads,
  Google Ads, and media buying for D2C brands and local businesses (doctors, roofing contractors,
  restaurants, real estate).
- [Software Development](https://www.growthescalators.com/services): custom software and product
  builds.
- [AI Automation](https://www.growthescalators.com/services): AI-driven marketing and operations
  automation.
- [Staffing](https://www.growthescalators.com/staffing): staffing and talent services.

- [About](https://www.growthescalators.com/about)

## Notes

This file is provided for AI agent readability. It carries no ranking or citation weight with
Google or Bing — it exists solely so AI agents and assistants can quickly understand what this
site and business are about.
